approval_gates.trigger: before changing infrastructure or deployment assets

work_items.title: Inventory demo-ready assets
work_items.goal: Review existing assets under examples and identify what is already strong enough for a workshop demo.

work_items.title: Inspect local MCP capability
work_items.goal: Review the random string MCP server and identify one realistic workflow use for it.

work_items.title: Prepare handoff packet example
work_items.goal: Convert findings into a clean packet that another agent can use without repeating discovery work.

work_items.title: Draft approval-aware execution plan
work_items.goal: Split discovery steps from mutating steps and define the checkpoint where a human must approve.
